title: PARA Workspace Architecture & Governance Standards (v1.7.x)
summary: Foundational architecture, governance, and efficiency standards for PARA Workspace v1.7.x. Covers: four-pillar structure (.para/, .agents/), Governing Kernel v1.5.3 (11 Invariants, 10 Heuristics incl. H10 KI), project.md schema v1.6.3 with field-gated I/O and @ecosystem/ path resolution, Ecosystem + Meta-Project types (v1.7.6), two-level Agent Index (workspace + project rules/skills with proactive trigger), Skills system v1.6.4 with /para-skill Co-Author workflow (v1.7.6) and Sidecar Skill pattern (v1.7.6.3), CLI with Smart Archive and catalog.yml governance, SYNC.md cross-project notifications, Knowledge System with platform-injected KI context (v1.7.0+), System KI governed lifecycle with template sync (v1.7.1), KR7 Ephemeral Reference Ban (v1.7.5), i18n docs/locales/ architecture (v1.7.6), orphan directory cleanup in installer (v1.7.6.3), Brainstorm Consolidation with Dual Output and naming convention {type}-{date}-{topic} (v1.7.7), and token optimization patterns (field-gated I/O, lazy-loading, strategy cascade). Covers 24 core workflows, 12 rules, and 4 skills.
